title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, EY India Asia Pacific Associates in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About EY India Asia Pacific Associates:
EY India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India Asia Pacific Associates!
